basic_details.job_title: Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Laboratory Assistant/ Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Kerala (CUK) has officially announced the Laboratory Assistant and Computer Operator Recruitment 2026 with 6 openings. Candidates up to 32 years of age who hold a Bachelor's Degree in Science or a relevant field, a three-year Diploma in the relevant discipline, or the prescribed Computer Science/Information Technology qualifications can submit their applications through email on or before 26-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Govt. of India Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Computer Science/ BCA/ B.E/ B.Tech. in Computer Science/ MCA/ any other relevant degrees related to computer science or Information Technology from recognized Institute /University
qualification.details: Laboratory Assistant: Bachelor Degree in Science or any other degree in the relevant field from recognized Institute /University. OR Three year diploma in relevant field. Desirable: Two years' experience in laboratory of Academic/ Research Institution. Computer Operator: 3-year Diploma in Computer Science/B.Sc. Computer Science/ BCA/B.E/B.Tech. in Computer Science /MCA/ any other relevant degrees related to computer science or Information Technology from recognized Institute /University.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Kerala Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Central University of Kerala Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Laboratory Assistant: Bachelor Degree in Science or any other degree in the relevant field from recognized Institute /University. OR Three year diploma in relevant field. Desirable: Two years' experience in laboratory of Academic/ Research Institution. Computer Operator: 3-year Diploma in Computer Science/B.Sc. Computer Science/ BCA/B.E/B.Tech. in Computer Science /MCA/ any other relevant degrees related to computer science or Information Technology from recognized Institute /University.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Govt. of India Rules.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Kerala Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email is 26th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Laboratory Assistant / Computer Operator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Laboratory Assistant and Computer Operator positions in the Central University of Kerala recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Laboratory Assistant post, candidates need a Bachelor Degree in Science or any other relevant degree, or a three-year diploma in the relevant field. Experience in a laboratory is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 23,360/- per month for both Laboratory Assistant and Computer Operator roles.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Central University of Kerala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial email application submission followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates should verify this in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Laboratory Assistant and Computer Operator are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Central University of Kerala located?
faq.answer: The Central University of Kerala is located in Kasaragod, Kerala.
